# LocallySF - San Francisco Local Directory

LocallySF is a comprehensive local directory for San Francisco and the Bay Area. We help people discover the best restaurants, cafes, bars, shopping, attractions, and services in the city.

## About LocallySF

LocallySF is "The Yellow Pages of Humanity" - a modern take on local business discovery that goes beyond simple listings. We provide:

- Real photos from actual visitors
- Authentic Google reviews and ratings  
- Detailed business information (hours, contact, location)
- Neighborhood-based browsing
- Category-specific discovery

## Coverage Areas

**Primary Coverage:**
- San Francisco, CA
- Oakland, CA  
- South San Francisco, CA
- Daly City, CA

**Neighborhoods in San Francisco:**
- Mission District
- Chinatown
- North Beach
- Castro
- Marina District
- Hayes Valley
- SoMa (South of Market)
- Haight-Ashbury
- Pacific Heights
- Richmond District
- Sunset District
- Financial District
- Union Square
- Nob Hill
- Russian Hill

## Categories

**🍽️ Restaurants & Dining**
- Fine dining establishments
- Casual dining
- Ethnic cuisines (Chinese, Mexican, Italian, Japanese, etc.)
- Brunch spots
- Fast food and quick service

**☕ Cafes & Coffee**
- Coffee shops
- Tea houses
- Bakeries with cafe seating
- Co-working cafes

**🍸 Bars & Nightlife**
- Cocktail bars
- Wine bars
- Breweries
- Sports bars
- Dance clubs
- Live music venues

**🛍️ Shopping & Retail**
- Boutique stores
- Vintage shops
- Department stores
- Specialty retailers
- Art galleries
- Bookstores

**🎭 Attractions & Entertainment**
- Museums
- Parks and recreation
- Tourist attractions
- Theaters
- Movie theaters
- Art installations

**💆 Services & Wellness**
- Spas and wellness centers
- Fitness gyms
- Hair salons and barbershops
- Beauty services
- Massage therapy
- Healthcare services

## Data Sources

All business information is sourced from Google Places API, ensuring:
- Accurate contact information
- Current business hours
- Real customer reviews
- Authentic photos
- Up-to-date ratings

## Website Structure

- Homepage: Featured places, category browsing, neighborhood exploration
- Category pages: Browse all businesses within a specific category
- Place detail pages: Complete information about individual businesses
- Neighborhood pages: Discover places within specific SF neighborhoods
- About page: Learn about LocallySF's mission and coverage

## Contact

For business listings, corrections, or general inquiries:
- Website: https://locallysf.com
- Add a business: https://locallysf.com/add-business
- Email: hello@locallysf.com

LocallySF is committed to supporting local businesses and helping residents and visitors discover the best of what San Francisco has to offer.
